chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21, so the compiler must be configured to generate bytecode compatible with JDK 21; otherwise, it will compile for JDK 17.

chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version to 21 in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21, reinforcing the JDK 21 migration.
